headlines.title: Trump delivers remarks at Mount Rushmore to kick off America’s 250th anniversary
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as President Trump delivers remarks at Mount Rushmore before a fireworks display, kicking off a weekend of 250th-anniversary celebrations across the country.

headlines.title: Trump to speak at Mount Rushmore, one monument he can’t remake
headlines.description: No presidential distinction rivals having one’s likeness carved onto Mt. Rushmore — an honor destined to elude Donald Trump, though his allies have pushed for it.

headlines.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address
headlines.description: The New York mayor gave a solidly pro-immigration speech, flanked by recently naturalized citizens, hours before the president plans to give his own address at Mount Rushmore.

headlines.title: Record heat disrupts America’s 250th birthday celebrations and travel
headlines.description: A record-setting heat wave is blanketing much of the U.S. as millions of Americans gather for Independence Day, prompting the cancellation of events marking America’s 250th birthday.

headlines.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are officially married
headlines.description: Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift appear to be married as an event at Madison Square Garden is underway. This comes as a sign that read "JUST&T MARRIED!" appeared outside of the venue. NBC News' Emilie Ikeda has more details.

headlines.title: Iran says millions expected at funeral for former supreme leader
headlines.description: Foreign dignitaries and senior Iranian leaders honored Ayatollah Ali Khamenei today, months after he was killed by the United States and Israel. Iran says organizers expect 15 to 20 million people at his dayslong state funeral. NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Tehran.

headlines.title: ¡Autogol! Argentina consigue el tercero tras un cabezazo de Romero y un poco de fortuna
headlines.description: ue un tiro de esquina, el centro fue de Lionel Messi y el remate fue del ‘Cuti’ Romero, pero un desvío en Diney Borges la mandó a guardar. Una fórmula con la que Argentina logró el 3-2 y se encuentra muy cerca de los octavos de final.

headlines.title: Egipto vence a Australia en penales y sella su pase a los Octavos de Final del Mundial 2026.
headlines.description: Egipto sobrevivió a una dramática tanda de penales y aseguró su boleto a los Octavos de Final del Mundial 2026. En la siguiente ronda se medirá al ganador del duelo entre Argentina y Cabo Verde.

headlines.title: England fans can drink until 5 a.m. for Mexico game
headlines.description: After public outcry, outgoing Prime Minister Keir Starmer staged a last-minute intervention to let pubs stay open, but police have raised concerns.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Portugal advances, Croatia sent packing after dramatic finish
headlines.description: Portugal advanced after edging out Croatia 2-1 in a hard-fought match, and Cristiano Ronaldo’s team will now face European champion Spain on Monday.

headlines.title: Gooooooooals: Tracking Mbappé and Messi’s battle for the all-time World Cup scoring record
headlines.description: NBC News is tracking French star Kylian Mbappé and Argentine legend Lionel Messi as they battle for the all-time FIFA World Cup scoring record.

headlines.title: Argentina sufre, pero avanza y ya piensa en lo que viene
headlines.description: Lionel Scaloni, Lionel Messi, Lisandro Martínez y Nicolás Tagliafico analizaron la sufrida victoria 3-2 sobre Cabo Verde. Coincidieron en valorar el carácter del equipo, felicitar al rival y enfocarse desde ya en los octavos de final.
